DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF LUPE PALOMARES' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET ONE MOTION GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE AMENDED RESPONSES WHICH COMPLY WITH CCP SECS 2033.220(B), (C) AND 2033.230. THE COURT OVERRULES ALL "LEGAL CONCLUSION" AND "ASSUMES FACTS" OBJECTIONS. SEE BURKE V. SUP. CT. (1969) 71 CAL. 2D 276; CCP SEC. 2033.010. THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION AS TO THE OTHER OBJECTIONS, HOWEVER DEFENDANT IS STILL REQUIRED TO COMPLY WITH SECS. 2033.220(B) AND (C), SPECIFICALLY PROVIDING RESPONSES THAT "REASONABLY AND CLEARLY" QUALIFY THAT WHICH IS ADMITTED OR DENIED BASED ON ANY REMAINING OBJECTIONS. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Motioj To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions Set One
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Casey A. Kaufman, Esq. of The Brandi Law Firm, Tel. 415.989.1800, for plaintiff and moving party;
Dawn N. Valentine, Esq. of Michel & Fackler, Tel. 925.933.7309, for defendant and opposing party;
Vanessa Viboch, Esq. of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara, Tel. 818.712.9800, for cross-defendant, via court call.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LUPE PALOMARES' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions Set One Motion granted in part and Denied in part. Defendant is ordered to provide amended responses which comply with CCP secs 2033.220(b), (c) and 2033.230. The Court overrules all "legal conclusion" and "assumes facts" objections. See Burke v. Sup. Ct. (1969) 71 Cal. 2d 276; CCP sec. 2033.010. The Court denies the motion as to the other objections, however Defendant is still required to comply with secs. 2033.220(b) and (c), specifically providing responses that "reasonably and clearly" qualify that which is admitted or denied based on any remaining objections. Plaintiff to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
